overall.description: A spaceship flies through a dark, cavernous sci-fi environment with glowing green industrial structures and rocky formations, transitioning from an enclosed canyon to open space. The footage appears to be from a high-end space simulation game, featuring smooth third-person camera work and atmospheric lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky canyon with glowing green infrastructure

events.description: spaceship banks slightly right while maintaining forward trajectory through the canyon

agents.ego_description: flying steadily through the narrow canyon, navigating between rock walls and green-lit platforms

entered.detail: illuminated green safety railings and platforms lining the left side of the canyon
dark rocky overhang covering the flight path overhead
textured rocky canyon wall on the right side
scattered floating rocks visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The spaceship navigates a narrow, dark canyon illuminated by green glowing railings on the left. Rocky walls and ceiling enclose the path while distant asteroids are visible ahead. The ship maintains a steady course with slight banking motions.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial station complex under rocky overhang

events.description: exits the narrow canyon into a wider area with industrial station structures
passes under a large floating rock formation temporarily blocking the view above

agents.ego_description: navigating past the industrial station structures, flying under floating rock formations while maintaining speed

entered.detail: large sci-fi industrial platform with yellow lighting and metal structures
massive floating rock formation suspended overhead

segments.scene_description: The environment opens into a semi-covered industrial area with a large station on the right and massive rock overhangs above. The ship flies under floating rock formations while passing the illuminated industrial complex, transitioning from the enclosed canyon to a more open construction zone.

scene_state.functional_zone: open asteroid field with nebula backdrop

events.description: leaves the industrial station behind and enters open space with scattered asteroids

agents.ego_description: accelerating into open space, leaving the station structures behind while navigating through the asteroid field

entered.detail: numerous floating rocks and debris scattered throughout the flight path
faint blue-green nebula clouds illuminating the distant background

segments.scene_description: The spaceship emerges into wide open space, leaving the rocky canyon and industrial station behind. The environment becomes a vast asteroid field with scattered rocks floating against a backdrop of nebula clouds and distant stars, creating a sense of open cosmic expanse.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a spaceship navigates a claustrophobic industrial canyon that gradually opens into a vast cosmic expanse. It begins by gliding through a narrow, dark corridor of rocky walls and ceilings, guided by the glow of green railings on the left. As the path widens, the scene shifts into a semi-covered industrial zone where the ship banks under massive rock overhangs and passes a large, illuminated station. The environment then expands further, leaving the rocky structures and construction complex behind as the ship emerges from the enclosure. Finally, the view opens completely into a wide asteroid field, with scattered rocks floating against a backdrop of distant stars and nebula clouds.
